---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A one-sentence description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve? Who is affected and how often?

<!-- Example: "As an NGO admin, I need to export donor data as CSV because
our accountant doesn't have access to the dashboard." -->

## Proposed solution

Describe your preferred solution. Include UI mockups, API contract sketches,
or example Telegram interactions if relevant.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Affected components

- [ ] FastAPI backend (`app/`)
- [ ] Next.js dashboard (`dashboard/`)
- [ ] Telegram bot handlers (`app/bot/`)
- [ ] AI agents (`app/agents/`)
- [ ] Scheduler / reminders (`app/scheduler/`)
- [ ] Database schema (requires migration)
- [ ] Integrations (Google, SendGrid, MSG91, …)
- [ ] CI/CD / infrastructure

## Acceptance criteria

<!-- List the conditions that must be true for this feature to be considered done -->

- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or references that would help scope this feature.
